title: Tiffany Grants Asuka Collection
wikitext:
[]: Tiffany Grant's Asuka Collection             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 31, 2009 6:04 pm I had recieved the Evangelion Platinum Perfect collection recently... And a forum member mentioned to me a couple of weeks or a month ago that if I do aquire the Platinum collection to see Tiffany's Asuka collection. And I must say it scared the living crap out of me... I don't mean that in a bad way. I mean just wow... It looks like the whole collection adds up to at least over... a lot of money! @_@

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sat Jan 31, 2009 6:09 pm My reaction was much like Misato's here .

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat Jan 31, 2009 8:08 pm Tiffany Grant probably thinks that she is Asuka. Where can you see her collection?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 31, 2009 8:22 pm Oedipusfoot wrote: Tiffany Grant probably thinks that she is Asuka. Where can you see her collection?

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat Jan 31, 2009 8:23 pm What, it's on a video??

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 31, 2009 8:37 pm Oedipusfoot wrote: What, it's on a video??

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat Jan 31, 2009 8:43 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Oedipusfoot wrote: What, it's on a video??

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sat Jan 31, 2009 10:03 pm This feels like Laurel and Hardy. ADV's original "Platinum" DVD release of Evangelion in America, (but not the thinpak edition, IIRC, and certainly not the old "Perfect" edition) contains a short feature where Tiffany Grant takes viewers through her collection of Asuka-related stuff. Not sure which volume it's on.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Mon Feb 02, 2009 1:03 pm Wonder if she still has it in this economy.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Feb 03, 2009 1:04 pm I don't think she'll give it up anytime soon. Even if the economy is crappy. Plus I think she has the money to live through it.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Tue Feb 03, 2009 2:36 pm I thought you didn't get paid much to be a voice actor. I guess she does other things?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Feb 03, 2009 2:41 pm Depending on company.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Feb 03, 2009 3:19 pm Oedipusfoot wrote: I thought you didn't get paid much to be a voice actor. I guess she does other things?

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Tue Feb 03, 2009 3:24 pm OHHHHH!!!! Ouch! Just...ouch!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 03, 2009 3:28 pm drinian wrote: This feels like Laurel and Hardy.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Feb 03, 2009 4:33 pm ZapalacX wrote: Oedipusfoot wrote: I thought you didn't get paid much to be a voice actor. I guess she does other things?

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Tue Feb 03, 2009 5:19 pm I'd laugh if either of them had a user account here, and perhaps would read that....

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Feb 03, 2009 6:26 pm Dartz wrote: I'd laugh if either of them had a user account here, and perhaps would read that....

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Tue Feb 03, 2009 7:18 pm ZapalacX wrote: Yes. Matt Greenfield.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 03, 2009 11:42 pm Whenever I question the size of my collection, I just remind myself that there are people out there that have so much more than me, and then I don't feel so bad anymore. At least I can fit the majority of my Eva stuff onto a single shelf unit. Granted, they're mostly books... which store well. Oh well.
